task_description: Phase 67 - Create @quant/brand package with complete brand system (colors, typography, motion, logos, per-app icons) and integrate across all 16 apps in the ecosystem

verification.summary: pnpm typecheck passes 111/111 tasks (up from 109 due to new brand package). pnpm build passes 88/88 tasks (up from 87). All existing functionality preserved. Brand package exports complete type-safe color, typography, motion, logo, and icon systems. Integration applied to all 7 Next.js apps with CSS variables, Tailwind configs, and layout metadata.
